title: Add DNSNames field
body:
Alias field should only contain user-provided aliases. DNSNames contains all DNS names.

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: Yeah I waffled back and forth with it, since the splitting in inspect seemed hacky but I can change it to that.
